data.definition: High blood pressure that does not have a known secondary cause.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Linked to chronic stress and anxiety about cardiovascular events.

data.definition: Chest pain or discomfort caused when your heart muscle doesn't get enough oxygen-rich blood.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Significant fear of heart attack (cardiac anxiety), leading to avoidant lifestyle behaviors.

data.definition: A heart attack; permanent damage to the heart muscle due to lack of blood supply.
data.mentalHealthImpact: High incidence of post-MI depression and PTSD related to the life-threatening event.

data.definition: A chronic condition in which the heart doesn't pump blood as well as it should.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Chronic fatigue leads to loss of independence and depression. Sleep apnea associated with HF can cause irritability.

data.definition: An irregular and often rapid heart rate that can increase your risk of stroke.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Palpitations cause sudden spikes in anxiety and health-related preoccupation.

data.definition: A stroke; brain tissue death due to lack of blood flow.
data.mentalHealthImpact: Emotional lability, depression (Post-stroke depression), and cognitive frustration.

data.definition: Chronic condition affecting the way the body processes blood sugar.

data.mentalHealthImpact: Strongly linked to brain fog, lethargy, and depressive symptoms.

data.definition: Persistent feeling of sadness and loss of interest.
data.physicalHealthImpact: Chronic pain, sleep disruption, and weakened immune system.
Muscle tension, GI issues (IBS), and tension headaches.

data.definition: Condition triggered by a terrifying event.
data.physicalHealthImpact: Hyper-vigilance leading to chronic adrenal fatigue and hypertension.
